title: citronella engleriana
intro: Citronella engleriana, also known as Java citronella, is a tropical grass native to Indonesia, belonging to the lemongrass family (Cymbopogon nardus). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of citronella engleriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to repel insects and mosquitoes. Citronella oil is often extracted from the plant and used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
